arts.ttl: "Out of my hands" - Man United star provides fresh update on future at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Christian Eriksen has expressed uncertainty about his future at Manchester United, admitting that he will not have any say over his potential stay after this season.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag's Man Utd record compared to Jose Mourinho
arts.sum: In comparison, during 2022/23 and 2023/24, Ten Hag's Red Devils played and won six fewer matches, with a final win percentage of just 59.1%. The Portuguese's Red Devils scored 206 times across his first two campaigns - one fewer than Ten Hag's side in six more matches - but only conceded 86 times, leaving them with a goal difference of +120.

arts.ttl: Man City break Man Utd's 15-year-old Champions League record
arts.sum: But the heavy nature of City's demolition of Sparta was enough to lift Pep Guardiola's side into third place thanks to a superior goal difference than the six other teams who also have seven points. Manchester City ensured on Wednesday night that the top three in the Champions League standings all belong to the Premier League, putting five goals past Sparta Prague.

arts.ttl: CR7 2.0? Man Utd face €100m hurdle to sign Ronaldo's 'little brother'
arts.sum: According to Portuguese media, Man Utd are interested in repeating their Ronaldo trick with Quenda, plucking the starlet straight from Sporting just as they did with their club legend 19 years ago. Manchester United are interested in Geovany Quenda, but the youngster has a €100 million release clause, according to Portuguese media.

arts.ttl: It's over! Man Utd greenlight Antony exit
arts.sum: Manchester United have given the green light for Antony to go out on loan in January, according to Brazilian media. After an absolutely dismal 2023/24 campaign, Antony has been restricted to just 27 minutes of Premier League football this season, with the Dutch manager clearly having given up on the Brazilian.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag fires warning to Jose Mourinho after ex-Man Utd chief's subtle dig
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag has insisted that his depleted team have nothing to fear when they lock horns with ex-boss Jose Mourinho and Fenerbahce in the Europa League

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag in confident mood as Man Utd target rare European victory
arts.sum: Ten Hag’s side take on Jose Mourinho’s Fenerbahce in Istanbul on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Man United boss Erik ten Hag issues Mason Mount injury update with attacker still unavailable
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Erik ten Hag provides a fitness update on Mason Mount, with the Englishman still unavailable for selection.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag responds to Jose Mourinho comments on Manchester United
arts.sum: Around six-and-a-half hours after Jose Mourinho finished his entertaining press conference, it was Erik ten Hag's turn at the Man United team hotel.

arts.ttl: Man United captain Bruno Fernandes sends perfect four-word message to Juan Mata
arts.sum: Former Manchester United midfielder Juan Mata has recently joined West Sydney Wanderers in the Australian A-League after leaving Vissel Kobe
